2605.12239.title: Harness Engineering as Categorical Architecture
2605.12239.paper_summary: The agent harness, the system layer comprising prompts, tools, memory, and orchestration logic that surrounds the model, has emerged as the central engineering abstraction for LLMbased agents. Yet harness design remains ad hoc, with no formal theory governing composition, preservation of properties under compilation, or systematic comparison across frameworks. We show that the categorical Architecture triple (G, Know, Phi) from the ArchAgents framework provides exactly this formalization. The four pillars of agent externalization (Memory, Skills, Protocols, Harness Engineering) map onto the triple's components: Memory as coalgebraic state, Skills as operad-composed objects, Protocols as syntactic wiring G, and the full Harness as the Architecture itself. Structural guarantees-integrity gates, quality-based escalation, supported convergence checks-are Know-level certificates whose preservation is structural replay: our compiler checks identity and verifier replay, not output-layer correctness or model behavior. We validate this correspondence with a reference implementation featuring compiler functors targeting Swarms, DeerFlow, Ralph, Scion, and LangGraph: the four configuration compilers preserve three named certificate types by identity or replay, and LangGraph preserves the same certificates through its shared per-stage execution path. The LangGraph compiler creates one node per stage using the same per-stage method as the native runtime, providing LangGraph-native observability without reimplementing harness logic. An end-to-end escalation experiment with real LLM agents confirms that the quality-based escalation control path is model-parametric in this two-model, one-task experiment. The result positions categorical architecture as the formal theory behind harness engineering.
2605.12239.paper_summary_zh: 代理人鞍具，即由提示、工具、記憶和圍繞模型的協調邏輯組成的系統層，已成為基於LLM的代理人的核心工程抽象。然而，鞍具設計仍然是隨意的，沒有正式的理論來規範組成、在編譯過程中屬性的保留或跨框架的系統比較。我們展示了ArchAgents框架中的範疇架構三元組 (G, Know, Phi) 正是提供了這種形式化。代理人外部化的四大支柱（記憶、技能、協議、鞍具工程）對應於三元組的組件：記憶作為共代數狀態，技能作為操作代數組成的對象，協議作為語法連接 G，整個鞍具作為架構本身。結構保證——完整性閘、基於質量的升級、支持的收斂檢查——是 Know 級別的證書，其保留是結構重播：我們的編譯器檢查身份和驗證者重播，而不是輸出層的正確性或模型行為。我們通過一個參考實現來驗證這一對應，該實現特徵編譯器函子，針對 Swarms、DeerFlow、Ralph、Scion 和 LangGraph：這四個配置編譯器通過身份或重播保留三種類型的證書，而 LangGraph 通過其共享的每階段執行路徑保留相同的證書。LangGraph 編譯器在每個階段創建一個節點，使用與本地運行時相同的每階段方法，提供 LangGraph 原生的可觀察性，而無需重新實現鞍具邏輯。與真實 LLM 代理人的端到端升級實驗確認，基於質量的升級控制路徑在這個兩模型、一任務的實驗中是模型參數化的。這一結果將範疇架構定位為鞍具工程背後的正式理論。
2605.12239.author: Bogdan Banu et.al.
